title: H2O+
description: Adds a stylish hydration reminder overlay to Minecraft, complete with sound effects, a sleek GUI, and customizable timer settings to help you stay hydrated while playing. 💧
body:
💧 H2O+ - A Hydration Reminder Mod

![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffccd2ca0285cd1118a1e734a11ac487270d7e66.jpeg)

H2O+ helps you stay hydrated while exploring, mining, or building in Minecraft.
Every 45 minutes (or your own custom interval), the mod reminds you to take a drink - complete with soft sound effects and a clean, animated overlay.

✨ Features
- 🕒 Customizable Timer: Adjust your hydration reminder in 5-minute steps.
- 🌍 Available in English and German.
- 🔊 Sound Effects: A subtle “bing” followed by gentle water sounds.
- 💬 On-Screen Message: Smooth fade-in notification at the top of your screen.
- 🧭 GUI Menu: Open the in-game menu to adjust your timer or disable the reminder entirely.
- 🎨 Stylish UI: Minimalist black overlay with blue water accents and a soft animation.

⚙️ Configuration
Open the in-game settings menu (default key: R, customizable in your controls) to:
- Increase or decrease the reminder interval.
- Toggle the reminder on or off.
- Instantly reset your timer.

🌐 Why H2O+?

Because even the toughest adventurers need water.
H2O+ turns self-care into part of your gameplay - stay focused, stay hydrated, and keep crafting strong.

![DrinkTime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72fb932824c0bcc38563bb81cee0e2871c946317.jpeg)
